name: sample-host-harmesagent-on-amazon-bedrock-agentcore
description: Deploy [hermes-agent](https://github.com/nousresearch/hermes-agent) (a self-improving AI agent with 40+ tools, multi-platform messaging, and skill learning) on **Amazon Bedrock AgentCore** — providing per-user isolation, serverless scaling, and managed Bedrock model access.
